value: Two-stage migration chain runs on first store access: (1) legacy 3-file format (entries.json + aliases.json + confirm.json) -> unified data.json via migrateToUnifiedFile (pre-v1.10.0, in src/store.ts). (2) unified data.json -> file-per-entry directory via migrateFileToDirectory (v1.10.0+, in src/utils/directoryStore.ts). Both stages idempotent. Old files renamed to .backup. Stage 2 uses atomic tmp-dir-rename for crash safety — writes to .codexcli.tmp/ then renames to .codexcli/ atomically.
